name: connector-contacts
description: Full read/write access to macOS Contacts — search, create, update, delete contacts, manage groups, and export vCards (via AppleScript/osascript)

tools.name: check_contacts_access
tools.description: Check macOS authorization status for Contacts access

tools.name: get_all_contacts
tools.description: List all contacts with basic info

tools.name: get_contact_details
tools.description: Full details for one contact by identifier. May read multiple contacts internally.

tools.name: delete_group
tools.description: Delete a group (contacts preserved, via AppleScript/osascript)

tools.name: get_group_members
tools.description: List contacts in a group (via AppleScript/osascript)

tools.name: add_contact_to_group
tools.description: Add a contact to a group (via AppleScript/osascript)

tools.name: remove_contact_from_group
tools.description: Remove a contact from a group (via AppleScript/osascript)

tools.name: export_contact_vcard
tools.description: Export a contact as vCard (via AppleScript/osascript)
